Name: DEMO_POINT_LIGHT_PARAM
Description: Defines configuration for point lights in demo scenes, including position, color, intensity, shadow behavior, and flicker (blink) effects.

Fields.Name: Position: X
Fields.Description: X-axis offset of the point light position.

Fields.Name: Position: Y
Fields.Description: Y-axis offset of the point light position.

Fields.Name: Position: Z
Fields.Description: Z-axis offset of the point light position.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Red
Fields.Description: Red component of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Green
Fields.Description: Green component of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue component of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Alpha
Fields.Description: Alpha (intensity/opacity) component of the diffuse light.

Fields.Name: Specular: Red
Fields.Description: Red component of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Green
Fields.Description: Green component of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue component of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Alpha
Fields.Description: Alpha (intensity) component of the specular highlight.

Fields.Name: Light Radius
Fields.Description: Effective range of the point light.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: Rendering or evaluation priority of the light.

Fields.Name: Shadow Strength
Fields.Description: Controls the intensity/darkness of shadows cast by the light.

Fields.Name: Blink Duration: Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum duration of light blinking cycles.

Fields.Name: Blink Duration: Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum duration of light blinking cycles.

Fields.Name: Blink Intensity
Fields.Description: Strength of the light flickering effect.

Fields.Name: Enable Shadow Casting
Fields.Description: Determines whether this light casts shadows.
